message:
feat(moe): add encodeExpertFFN_Q2K_Hybrid dispatch function

Add hybrid Q2K + sparse outlier expert FFN computation:
- 3-pass architecture matching Q4K path
- Pass 1: Gate + Up + SwiGLU with CSR sparse corrections
- Pass 2: Down projection with CSR sparse corrections
- Pass 3: Weighted add to output accumulator

Kernel buffers:
- Buffers 0-6: Base Q2K weights + intermediates
- Buffers 7-10: Scalar parameters
- Buffers 11: Token indices (nullptr for single)
- Buffers 12-17: Gate/Up CSR (row_ptr, col_idx, values)
- Buffers 8-10: Down CSR (row_ptr, col_idx, values)

Formula: y = Q2K_matmul(x, W) + sparse_correction(x, outliers)

Next: Create Q2_K model and wire dispatch in forward path
